visual_description: In a dimly lit tiled room, an older man in a light suit shakes hands with a man in a shiny sequined jacket. Two men in dark robes stand behind them, and one of them hands a black rectangular object to the man in the sequined jacket, who looks at it. The older man watches the exchange while the other men remain stationary.
